function solve(grid, x, y, k) {
    const newGrid = grid.map(row => [...row]);
    const submatrixRows = newGrid.slice(x, x + k).map(row => row.slice(y, y + k));
    submatrixRows.reverse();

        const originalRow = newGrid[x + i];
        const newSubRow = submatrixRows[i];
        for (let j = 0; j < k; j++) {

    }

}
